meta.title: Watch SpaceX Launch #CREW6 for NASA!
meta.description:
For the sixth time, SpaceX will launch astronauts to the International Space Station (ISS) in the Crew Dragon spacecraft atop a Falcon 9 rocket for the Commercial Crew Program. The rocket is set to lift off from Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A), Kennedy Space Center, Florida, USA. Crew-6 will be the fourth flight of the Crew Dragon Endeavour spacecraft.

For more info on this launch check out our Prelaunch-Preview! - https://everydayastronaut.com/crew-6-falcon-9-block-5/

00:00 - Intro
03:20 - Prelaunch Preview
09:17 - Q&A
26:15 - What was the cause of the previous scrub
34:02 - T - One Minute
35:02 - Liftoff!
37:40 - Stage Separation
44:00 - Landing!
47:05 - Dragon Separation
48:00 - Speeches
53:00 - Q&A

--------------------------
